# komodo_alerter (Action)

Invokes any action that belongs to a Komodo alerter resource. Set `action` to select the operation: `test`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "komodo_alerter" "example" {
  name = "slack-alerts"

  endpoint {
    type = "Slack"
    url  = var.slack_webhook_url
  }

  lifecycle {
    action_trigger {
      events = [
        after_create,
        after_update,
      ]
      actions = [
        action.komodo_alerter.test
      ]
    }
  }
}

action "komodo_alerter" "test" {
  config {
    id     = komodo_alerter.example.id
    action = "test"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) The alerter operation to perform. Valid values: `test`.
- `id` (String) The ID of the target alerter.
